name: Andrew Friday
title: Founder / Game Producer
summary: Founder/operator with 15+ years in games. I take messy zero-to-one problems and turn them into shipped products. Shipped 20+ games since 2010, managed titles generating $150M+ in revenue, built remote teams from 2 to 40, and raised $7M in venture funding including A16Z. I'm at my best when the situation is unclear and the stakes are high.
highlights: Raised $7M in venture funding including A16Z

experience.title: Founder
experience.description:
Independent Game Studio  •  San Francisco Bay Area
Building original titles and selective game outsourcing projects. Currently developing an indie game for Steam and a mobile-first title for potential publishers.
highlights: Guild of Guardians (Executive Producer with Mineloader Studios): Took over a stalled project, redesigned the game, scaled global team to 40, and launched in 12 months with D1 retention >60% and >$24M in revenue to date.
Magic Eden: Designed and shipped an early ME token rewards system in 2023, generating millions in value to the ecosystem.

experience.title: Co-Founder & CEO
experience.description:
Agentic Lifesim Game  •  San Francisco Bay Area
Early innovator at the intersection of life simulation, agents, and gaming.
highlights: Raised seed round from A16Z Speedrun, Dave Baszucki (founder of Roblox), and 5+ game industry insiders.
Shipped Auravale.io, a playable agentic life sim demo that moved the agentic gaming space forward significantly.
Ran viral marketing campaigns reaching 5M+ organic impressions for AuraVale.

projects.name: Auravale
projects.description: A playable agentic life sim demo

experience.title: Co-Founder & CEO
experience.description:
Mobile & Web Gaming Studio  •  San Francisco Bay Area
Founded a mobile gaming studio that shipped 10 games, accumulated 6M+ installs, later pivoted to web3 to release the first 3rd party game on the ImmutableX blockchain.
highlights: Launched first game 2 months after founding; profitable within 4 months.
Vy Worlds grew to 14K community members and produced 9K+ user-created games.
Raised $6M+ from LVP, March Gaming, Raine, and Ludlow Ventures.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
experience.description:
San Francisco Bay Area
Led product on the emerging platforms team, rapidly developing games for Facebook Messenger and iMessage.
highlights: Shipped 6+ HTML5 titles generating 100M+ installs on Facebook Instant Games.

experience.title: Product Manager
highlights: Product manager on Kim Kardashian: Hollywood, Eternity Warriors 4, and 全民突击 FPS game (co-published with Tencent).
Designed and shipped the subscriptions monetization feature for Kim Kardashian: Hollywood, leading to a 15% increase in revenue (more than $3M/year).

experience.title: Co-Founder
experience.description:
Beijing, China
Built an educational gaming studio in the early days of the App Store.
highlights: Meerkat Math: generated six figures of revenue for less than 3 months of dev time.
The Reading Train: 180K downloads and 1M+ books read with 55% day-30 retention; partnered with the US Teacher of the Year to write 100+ books for the platform.

experience.title: Product Manager
experience.description:
Beijing, China
Joined one of the first Chinese mobile gaming studios as a Product Manager and game designer on Legend Four, focused on the Western market.
highlights: Reached #44 on the US iTunes top chart in 2013 and was licensed to Kabam.

education: B.S. Economics, The Ohio State University  |  Minor in Music  |  Mandarin professional working proficiency
